Total Breakthrough Training



Action Form 12



Please complete this action form and save it to your own computer.  Submit all Action Forms in one email along with your Final Paper when you have completed everything.  Please do not send Action Forms individually.



Name:



Date:







List the questions you will ask your Client.





 

Write down the story of your Client's life and ask your Client to tell you about themselves as if they were a character in their own life story.





 

How did you retell your Client their story from an empowering perspective and give them a directive for greater happiness.
